data_flows.description: Agent publishes kind 31400 ControlPanel or kind 31402 ActionRequest to the relay. The forum relay gates writes by signed-event pubkey whitelist, not by a forced NIP-42 AUTH round-trip.
Forum governance UI subscribes to kinds 31400-31405 and renders pending action requests for human review
Human publishes kind 31403 ActionResponse with NIP-98 signed decision (Approve/Reject/Modify/Defer/Promote)
Agentbox relay-consumer receives decision and dispatches to handleGovernanceDecision() on the orchestrator adapter
Governance decision provenance and enrichment gating forwarded to VisionClaw via ontology bridge for PROV-O recording

guides.description: Agent Control Surface event kinds 31400-31405 schema: ControlPanel, PanelUpdate, ActionRequest, ActionResponse, CaseRecord, Precedent
Kind 31400 ControlPanel definition: declares agent capabilities, constraints, and available actions for human governance

Decision-outcome handling: Approve, Reject, Modify, Defer, Promote, Precedent. handleGovernanceDecision parses the outcome, mints PROV-O activity/receipt URNs, and dispatches to the agent or persists to the pod.

Standing precedents stored in RuVector with semantic embeddings. Matching precedents auto-apply decisions without human routing. The governance-precedents namespace is write-protected (IR2 mandate-at-grant).
End-to-end mesh smoke test protocol: agent publishes, relay gates, forum renders, human decides, broker receives, pod writes, traceability verified

sensors.description: Relay write gate: the edge relay advertises auth_required:false and gates on the signed event's pubkey being whitelisted (is_whitelisted), not on a forced NIP-42 AUTH round-trip. NIP-42 answering exists only in the WASM browser client. NIP-98 gates HTTP governance endpoints.

Governance UI rendering validation: all 6 event kinds render correctly, action buttons emit valid signed responses, panel state reflects latest updates. PLANNED — the UI lives in the nostr-bbs-bbs-client WASM screens; no dedicated render test exists yet.
Decision chain integrity: every ActionResponse references a valid ActionRequest, outcome is a valid decision variant, PROV-O bead minted
Precedent matching sensor: semantic similarity search against the governance-precedents namespace. Reports match confidence and auto-application eligibility.
End-to-end mesh smoke test: validates the full decision loop across all substrates per docs/protocol/mesh-smoke-test.md assertions
